summary: The candidate has been accepted for the Senior Backend Engineer (Python/FastAPI) role. The plan focuses on addressing the missing technical interview and outreach engagement during the onboarding process.

critical_gaps: Lack of evidence in non-technical areas

focus: Engage with the team and stakeholders
tasks: Schedule and conduct a technical interview with the candidate
Develop a plan for the candidate to engage with the team and stakeholders
success_metrics: Candidate establishes relationships with team and stakeholders
learning_resources: Team and stakeholder engagement best practices

focus: Onboard the candidate into the team
tasks: Assign a buddy to the candidate
Develop a project plan with clear goals and objectives
success_metrics: Project plan is developed and approved

tasks: Assign a project to the candidate
Establish a regular check-in routine with the candidate
success_metrics: Project is delivered on time and to satisfaction

top_strengths: Strong technical skills in Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS, and Kafka
plan_json.manager_guidance: Please provide regular feedback and check-ins with the candidate to ensure they are meeting the expectations.
plan_json.executive_summary: The candidate has been accepted for the Senior Backend Engineer (Python/FastAPI) role. The plan focuses on addressing the missing technical interview and outreach engagement during the onboarding process.
plan_json.internal_hr_notes: Please note that the candidate's technical interview is missing and will need to be completed during the onboarding process.

twelve_month_plan.target_capability: Senior Backend Engineer with leadership skills
ownership_expectations: Take ownership of a critical project

recommended_resources.title: Technical Interview Preparation
recommended_resources.reason: To help the candidate prepare for the technical interview

recommended_resources.title: Team and Stakeholder Engagement
recommended_resources.reason: To help the candidate understand best practices for engaging with the team and stakeholders

plan_json.candidate_facing_message: Welcome aboard, Alex. We have prepared a tailored 30/60/90 ramp-up plan focused on Kafka, on-call ownership and database performance. Excited to have you join the team.
